commands.review_summary:
This PR adds English tooltip strings, `title`/`aria-label` attributes for the Sessions table Thinking and Reasoning controls, and a jsdom test asserting those attributes.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +33. Total +44 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a strict bug reproduction: this is a UI discoverability enhancement. Source inspection does confirm current main lacks tooltip attributes on the affected headers and selects.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is contributor or maintainer follow-up for real behavior proof and generated i18n outputs, not an item cleanup close.

target.title: fix(control-ui): add tooltips for Reasoning and Thinking dropdowns (#90445)
target.body:
## Summary

Closes #90445.

The Control Panel Sessions table exposes two per-session dropdowns ("Reasoning" and "Thinking") whose meaning is opaque to users and collides with the corresponding config field names (`reasoningEffort`, `reasoning`). Per the issue, the smallest viable improvement is inline explanatory copy on the dropdowns themselves.

This change adds `title` + `aria-label` tooltips to both `<select>` controls and `title` tooltips to the matching column headers in `ui/src/ui/views/sessions.ts`, using new i18n strings:

- **Reasoning** -> `"How reasoning output is shown in chat (display/transport)."`
- **Thinking** -> `"Maps to provider reasoning_effort. Only effective when the model supports it (compat.supportsReasoningEffort)."`

No renames, no semantics change, no behavior change. Display/transport for `Reasoning` and `reasoning_effort` mapping for `Thinking` matches the contract the issue author confirmed.

Files touched:

- `ui/src/i18n/locales/en.ts` - two new keys: `sessionsView.thinkingTooltip`, `sessionsView.reasoningTooltip`.
- `ui/src/ui/views/sessions.ts` - apply tooltips to the column headers and the two `<select>` controls.
- `ui/src/ui/views/sessions.test.ts` - new test asserting `title`/`aria-label` are present on both controls and headers.

Per `ui/CLAUDE.md`, non-English locale bundles are generated; the English source bundle is the source of truth and the maintainer can regenerate locales separately (`pnpm ui:i18n:sync`).

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Control Panel Sessions table Reasoning / Thinking dropdowns had no inline documentation; users had to guess what each did.

Real environment tested: openclaw worktree on `main` after rebase, Node 22, jsdom-based Vitest (`ui/src/ui/views/sessions.test.ts`).

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/sessions.test.ts
```

Evidence after fix:

```
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  27 passed (27)
   Duration  831ms
```

The new test (`renders explanatory tooltips on Thinking and Reasoning dropdowns`) renders the sessions view and asserts that both `<th>` headers and both `<select>` controls expose tooltip copy containing `reasoning_effort` (Thinking) and `display` (Reasoning).

Observed result after fix: hover on either Reasoning/Thinking column header or its `<select>` surfaces the explanatory tooltip; screen readers receive the same text via `aria-label`. Dropdown values, options, and inheritance behavior are unchanged.

What was not tested: in-browser visual hover rendering across browsers; non-English locale bundles (left for maintainer-run i18n sync).
target.author: lonexreb
